## Quick checks

- [ ] `flutter analyze` is happy
- [ ] `flutter test` passes
- [ ] If you touched pitch / BPM scheduler / note math: ran `flutter test --coverage` + `bash tool/verify_core_coverage.sh`
- [ ] No sketchy new analytics or “always-on mic” stuff without talking to maintainer ([plan.md](plan.md))
- [ ] No secrets in the diff (keystores, real `key.properties`, keys, your `C:\Users\...` paths)
